question.content: For the BJT amplifier, find UCQ, output RMS voltage at 10 mV input RMS, first distortion type, and maximum undistorted output RMS voltage Uom. Use distortion code 1 for saturation-first and 2 for cutoff-first. Output exactly four comma-separated values as UCQ,Uo_rms,distortion_code,Uom_rms; UCQ has 2 decimals, Uo_rms has 3 decimals, distortion_code is integer 1 or 2, Uom_rms has 3 decimals; plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text. Answer format: UCQ,Uo_rms,distortion_code,Uom_rms in that order; write only the final results, with no units, explanatory text, or equals signs.

step_1.content: Solve the quiescent point and small-signal gain, then inspect load-line headroom for clipping order.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 4 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up the governing relation for UCQ.

step_5.content: Analyze panel 2 of 4 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_5.key_point: Transform the relation and isolate UCQ.

step_7.content: Analyze panel 3 of 4 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_7.key_point: Substitute required values/constants to obtain UCQ.

step_9.content: Output UCQ, Uo_rms, distortion code, and Uom_rms in order.
step_9.key_point: Obtain UCQ, Uo_rms, distortion code, and Uom_rms.
